Describe the element in the image below and suggest a token.

response.content: {"description":"A large-diaphragm condenser studio microphone with a matte champagne/silver cylindrical body. The upper capsule section features a fine mesh metal grille. Engraved text on the body reads 'PHANTOM classic' with a circular logo above it, and 'Nr. 1307' near the base. The microphone is mounted in a silver spider shock mount with elastic suspension bands. A round black pop filter with a dual-mesh screen is attached via a gooseneck arm to the left side of the stand. The overall finish is brushed satin nickel/champagne metal.","consistencyTag":"champagne-condenser-studio-microphone","suggestedToken":"PHANTOM_CLASSIC_MIC"}
